allOf.description: Optional: An integer that specifies the maximum number of DNSSEC configuration results that you want Amazon Route 53 to return. If you don't specify a value for MaxResults, Route 53 returns up to 100 configuration per page.

(Optional) If the current Amazon Web Services account has more than MaxResults DNSSEC configurations, use NextToken to get the second and subsequent pages of results.

For the first ListResolverDnssecConfigs request, omit this value.

For the second and subsequent requests, get the value of NextToken from the previous response and specify that value for NextToken in the request.
An optional specification to return a subset of objects.
